name: Ideal
description_short: IDEAL Electrical manufactures and sells electrical tools and wire connectors for professional electricians. This company does not offer financial services and should not be listed on CreditDoc.
description_long:
IDEAL Electrical is a manufacturer and distributor of professional-grade electrical tools and supplies, not a consumer finance company. The company specializes in products for electricians and contractors, including wire connectors, hand tools, fish tape, conduit benders, and circuit tracers. Their product lines include wire connectors (Twister, ProFLEX, In-Sure Lever), hand tools (Guardian Bender), testing equipment (SureTrace Circuit Tracer), and accessories (ClearGlide aerosol lubricant, digital fish tape with BlueView technology). IDEAL Electrical operates a rewards program called Champions Club and offers a BILT mobile app to connect electricians with product information and community features.

The company does not provide any consumer financial services, lending products, credit services, or alternative financial products. There is no evidence of payday alternatives, personal loans, emergency cash lending, credit repair, debt relief, or any other financial services on their website. Their entire business model is B2B and B2C retail sales of electrical tools and supplies to professional and consumer customers.

IDEAL Electrical has received recognition from Pro Tool Reviews and Popular Mechanics for their 2025 product innovations, particularly their SureTrace Pro Circuit Tracer, digital fish tape, and Guardian Bender. They emphasize jobsite convenience and professional-grade quality in all their offerings.

This company has been miscategorized on CreditDoc. It should be removed from the consumer finance platform entirely, as it operates exclusively in the electrical tools and equipment industry with no connection to consumer lending, credit services, or financial products.
services: Wire connector manufacturing and retail (Twister, ProFLEX, In-Sure brands)

Circuit tracing equipment (SureTrace Pro Circuit Tracer)
Mobile app (BILT) for electrician community and product information
Champions Club rewards program for customers
Contractor reward programs for team supply

diagnosis: IDEAL Electrical is a manufacturer and retailer of professional electrical tools and equipment—not a consumer finance company. This company should be removed from CreditDoc immediately as it offers no financial services, lending products, or credit alternatives of any kind. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is factually inaccurate and misleading.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
